case_title: YUK LIN LEONG VS. JOHN ZE LOWE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, YUK LIN AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, JOHN ZE FENG DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-18-2010
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, YUK LIN SERVED SEP-27-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, JOHN ZE FENG
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON OCT-19-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-03-2010 CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, YUK LIN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 6.0 DAYS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-14-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST TO TAKE OSC OFF CALENDAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, YUK LIN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-28-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
